name: CoinDCX Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: India's largest cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access spot trading with INR and USDT pairs, futures trading, market data, and account management, with HMAC-SHA256 authentication and India-specific regulatory compliance including mandatory KYC via PAN/Aadhaar.
use_cases: Accessing INR-denominated spot markets via CoinDCX API for Indian market crypto trading
Executing trades via CoinDCX API for INR/crypto algorithmic trading strategies
Managing futures positions via CoinDCX API for leveraged cryptocurrency trading in India
Streaming market data via CoinDCX WebSocket for real-time order book and trade feeds
Fetching account balances via CoinDCX API for Indian portfolio tracking applications
not_for: Non-Indian traders (CoinDCX is India-regulated and INR-focused)
Institutional custody (use BitGo or regulated Indian custodians)
best_when: An Indian developer or trader needs to integrate with India's largest regulated crypto exchange for INR-denominated trading with strong regulatory standing.
avoid_when: You're not based in India, need global exchange coverage, or require trading without mandatory identity verification.

auth.notes: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Headers: X-AUTH-APIKEY, X-AUTH-SIGNATURE. Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of request body JSON string using secret key. No timestamp in standard signature (some endpoints use timestamp in body). REST API at api.coindcx.com/. WebSocket: wss://stream.coindcx.com/. API key from CoinDCX account settings. KYC required for trading API access. Rate limits vary by endpoint.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; trading fees: 0.15-0.20% maker/taker
pricing.paid_tiers: Volume-based fee discounts; CoinDCX Pro for advanced features
pricing.notes: Indian company (Mumbai). Founded 2018 by Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal. Unicorn (>$1B valuation, 2021). ~$100M+ funding (Coinbase Ventures, B Capital, Pantera). India's largest crypto exchange by volume. Indian regulatory compliance: FEMA regulations, TDS (1% tax deduction at source on crypto gains since 2022). KYC: PAN card + Aadhaar mandatory. INR trading pairs: direct INR deposit/withdrawal via UPI, bank transfer. Products: Spot, Futures (via Futures Pro), CoinDCX Earn (staking). dcxLearn: crypto education platform. ~300+ trading pairs. PMLA compliance: anti-money laundering reporting.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; reasonable limits for retail trading

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: X-AUTH-APIKEY + X-AUTH-SIGNATURE headers. HMAC-SHA256 of body JSON. KYC mandatory (PAN/Aadhaar). India-only (INR). 1% TDS on crypto gains (Indian tax). Unicorn. Coinbase Ventures backed.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: client_order_id for idempotent tracking where supported. Market data reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: HMAC signature: sign the JSON body string directly (not URL params) — different from query-param-based exchanges
KYC mandatory: PAN + Aadhaar verification required before trading API access
Indian TDS: 1% tax deducted at source on crypto-to-crypto trades since 2022 — affects P&L calculations
INR-focused: best for INR pairs; USDT pairs also available but INR liquidity is primary
India-only exchange: non-Indian users may not be able to complete KYC
FEMA compliance: Indian foreign exchange laws apply — large transfers may require reporting

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 signing of request body. Indian regulation: FEMA + PMLA compliance. Mandatory KYC (PAN/Aadhaar): strong identity verification reduces fraud risk. Unicorn with institutional backing (Coinbase Ventures). X-AUTH-APIKEY header (not query param). Indian data localization: data stored in India. 1% TDS creates transaction audit trail. No withdrawal limits without KYC.
